sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount) VALUES (1, 10.0), (2, 20.0), (3, NULL), (4, 40.0);
UPDATE sales SET amount = NULL WHERE id = 2;
SELECT geometric_mean(amount) FROM sales WHERE amount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT geometric_mean(amount) OVER () AS overall_geometric_mean FROM sales;
